title: White Satin Ribbon 25mm x 22 Meters, Solid Colour Fabric Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, Crafting, Balloon, Sewing Project, Hair Bows, Bridal Bouquet, Wedding Favours Decoration
features: White Ribbon - Each roll ribbon is 22 meters, and the witdh of ribbon is 25mm. Satin ribbon is long enough whitch can be cut arbitrarily to meet various decorative needs

Exquisite Satin Fabric - It's a smooth silky ribbon made of high-quality polyester fabric and one side is full of shiny smoothness and luxury. There are many colors optional, every color is very bright, it's the best choice for a DIY project

Wide Range of Uses - Solid color ribbons are the best choice for gift wrapping, these colourful ribbons make your gift more delicate and lovely. Satin ribbon are also suitable for balloons, DIY crafting,hair bows, garlands making, cake boxes decors, wedding favours and other party decorations

Holiday Decorating Supplies - These satin ribbons are great for various occasions, such as red ribbons for Valentine's Day, pink ribbons for Mother's Day and Thanksgiving, green ribbons for Easter, orange ribbons for Halloween, and green/red for Christmas decorations. Using these shiny yet simple polyester satin ribbons adds a festive atmosphere
Warm Tips - The ends of the cutting ribbons need to be sealed to prevent fraying.
